checks.label: Human-approved requirement artifact exists
checks.detail: requirement markdown must exist under req/, contain at least 1000 bytes, contain no TODO/TBD markers, and match req/approval_manifest.json; bytes=5524; approval_manifest=False; pending_review=False; review_decision=False; missing or invalid approval manifest: missing req/approval_manifest.json
checks.next_action: capture requirement intent in mctp_assembler/req/*.md before SSOT signoff
